basic_details.short_information: Hooghly Cochin Shipyard Limited (HCSL) has officially released the Supervisor (HR) Recruitment 2026 notification (Advt. No. HCSL/HR/RECTT/CONT/2026-27/4) for 1 vacancy. Eligible candidates with a Bachelor’s Degree in Arts (excluding Fine Arts/Performing Arts), Science, Commerce, Computer Applications, Bachelor of Social Work, or Business Administration with a minimum of 60% marks and aged up to 45 years (upper age limit after relaxation not exceeding 55 years) can apply online from the notification release date to 31 July 2026 through the official HCSL application portal. Selected candidates w

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 45 years as on 31st July 2026. Upper age limit after relaxation not to exceed 55 years.
age_limit.details: Maximum 45 years as on 31st July 2026. Age relaxation for PwBD and Ex-servicemen: As per Government of India guidelines, not exceeding 55 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Arts (other than Fine Arts/ Performing Arts) or Science or Commerce or Computer Applications or Bachelor of Social Work, Business Administration, with minimum 60% of marks from a recognized University.
qualification.details: Supervisor (HR) on Contract Basis: Bachelor's Degree in Arts (other than Fine Arts/ Performing Arts) or Science or Commerce or Computer Applications or Bachelor of Social Work, Business Administration, with minimum 60% of marks from a recognized University. Experience: Minimum 7 years post qualification experience in matters relating to human resource/ Labor welfare/ contract labor management/ Office work, Recruitment activities / maintenance of files, registers and records in a Public / Private sector /Commercial Organization. Desirable: Proficiency in Computer Applications like MS Office (MS Excel, MS Word & MS Power Point), SAP etc.

salary_details.pay_scale: Consolidated pay ranging from Rs. 40,650/- to Rs. 44,164/- per month over 5 years.

selection_process: Phase I - Written test (Objective Type Test – 40 Marks & Descriptive Type Test-40 Marks) Phase II – PowerPoint presentation on work experience (20 Marks)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: HCSL Supervisor (HR) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the HCSL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download HCSL Supervisor (HR) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: HCSL Supervisor (HR) Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Supervisor (HR) on Contract Basis: Bachelor's Degree in Arts (other than Fine Arts/ Performing Arts) or Science or Commerce or Computer Applications or Bachelor of Social Work, Business Administration, with minimum 60% of marks from a recognized University. Experience: Minimum 7 years post qualification experience in matters relating to human resource/ Labor welfare/ contract labor management/ Office work, Recruitment activities / maintenance of files, registers and records in a Public / Private sector /Commercial Organization. Desirable: Proficiency in Computer Applications like MS Office (MS Excel, MS Word & MS Power Point), SAP etc.

content_sections.heading: HCSL Supervisor (HR) Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum 45 years as on 31st July 2026. Age relaxation for PwBD and Ex-servicemen: As per Government of India guidelines, not exceeding 55 years.

content_sections.heading: HCSL Supervisor (HR) Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Phase I - Written test (Objective Type Test – 40 Marks & Descriptive Type Test-40 Marks) Phase II – PowerPoint presentation on work experience (20 Marks)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HCSL to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HCSL Supervisor (HR) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the HCSL Supervisor (HR) post is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Supervisor (HR) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Arts, Science, Commerce, Computer Applications, Bachelor of Social Work, or Business Administration with a minimum of 60% marks from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Supervisor (HR) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 45 years as of 31st July 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for specific categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Supervisor (HR) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Supervisor (HR) position on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Supervisor (HR) role?
faq.answer: The consolidated pay ranges from Rs. 40,650/- in the first year to Rs. 44,164/- in the fifth year, with incremental increases each year.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the HCSL Supervisor (HR) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 300/- for General and OBC categories. SC/ST/PwBD candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Supervisor (HR) post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written Test (Objective and Descriptive) and a PowerPoint Presentation on work experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the recruitment is for a Supervisor (HR) post on a contract basis for a period of 5 years.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum experience required for this role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 7 years of post-qualification experience in HR-related matters is required for this position.
